label: HTML blog article
content:
Why we moved off microservices

Eighteen months ago we split our monolith into fourteen services. Last quarter we merged most of them back. Here is what we learned about premature decomposition, distributed transactions, and the operational tax of a service mesh.

The operational tax

Every service needed its own dashboards, alerts, and on-call rotation. For a team of six, that overhead swamped any scaling benefit.
